summary: Independent QA accepts M3 tribute/troop obligation fulfillment after systems R3 ACCEPT. Task state is coherent in REVIEW after systems acceptance, route evidence is complete, diff scope stays inside allowed paths, no M4 campaign/marching/battle, client UI, content-source, save-format, full diplomacy, or rebellion expansion was found. Obligation source, nominal/due/delivered/arrears/default accounting, resource-source deductions, troop commitment placeholder semantics, deterministic command handling, reason codes, and negative coverage were verified.

tests_run.command: validate-handoff writer R3 and systems R3

tests_run.result: ok=true; status REVIEW; route_to systems_architect; required fields present.
Node/worker hashes matched: hello 61e0ba1c, command/query d275faa4, save/load 28074edd.
Architecture passed; root 23 files/145 tests passed; web 1 file/3 tests passed.

tests_run.command: targeted partial fulfillment then deferral/overfull/final fulfillment probe
tests_run.result: Final stdin probe passed; deferral and overfull fulfillment rejected, final remaining 100 accepted, cash deducted exactly 120, world validation clean. Earlier probe attempts failed only from PowerShell --eval quoting and an over-strict harness assertion.

decisions: ACCEPT: systems R3 ACCEPT is coherent with task REVIEW state and lead-to-QA route evidence.
ACCEPT: allowed_paths/forbidden_paths compliance verified by git status and diff against main, including untracked task message/route/test artifacts.
ACCEPT: M3 troop obligations remain readiness/headcount placeholders only; no M4 campaign/army movement/combat state was introduced.
ACCEPT: M3 save-format remains intentionally unsupported; requestSaveV1 rejection for state.m3 remains the correct boundary for this task.
risks: Existing MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON warning remains in deterministic RNG worker fixture; not introduced by this task and not blocking.
The QA handoff file was not written by the QA thread because it was explicitly running in read-only mode; lead persisted this exact handoff after ACCEPT.
requested_action: Lead may integrate and close M3-TRIBUTE-TROOP-OBLIGATIONS-001.
